title: MultiLinearLayout
description:
MultiLinearLayout: Linear distribution of points along multiple linear parallel axes, defined along a vector from one side of the perimeter of the host object to the other. 
Starts by fitting in as many points as possible in the first layer, then generates a new one and repeats.

NumberOfPoints.description: Number of points along the axis.

ParallelMinimumSpacing.description: Minimum distance between any two points in the layout along the axis layers. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

PerpendicularMinimumSpacing.description: Minimum distance between any two layers. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Offset.description:
Offset of the linear layout in relation to the reference point, perpendicular to the Direction vector in the XY plane.
A positive value will mean an offset towards the centre of the boundingbox of the host objects. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
